title: chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 — normalized per-(chromosome × dyad) CO/DCO/NCO counts
description: Typed payload for normalized per-(chromosome × dyad) meiosis-event counts. One row per (parent_id, offspring_id, chrom) tuple with raw counts, rate-per-Mb derivatives, and (optionally) karyotype stratification at a focal inversion. Produced by 'normalize_chromosome_meiosis_events' from a staging_chromosome_meiosis_events_v0 envelope; lineage tracked in envelope.provenance.source_layer_ids. Backs meiosis_atlas product chromosome_meiosis_events.v1.

events.description: One row per (chromosome × dyad). At least one of n_co / n_dco / n_nco must be populated for the row to be informative; missing fields coerce to null rather than 0 to distinguish 'no data' from 'data says zero'.

chrom_len_bp.description: Chromosome length in bp; needed for rate_per_mb views.

co_per_mb.description: n_co / chrom_len_bp * 1e6; may be pre-computed by producer or derivable client-side.

mean_co_position_bp.description: Mean CO breakpoint position along the chromosome.

karyotype_at_focal_inv.description: Optional: karyotype at the focal inversion when the row is karyotype-stratified. Drives the intrachromosomal-effect view (CO_rate(het) vs CO_rate(non-het)).

sum_n_co.description: Sum of n_co across rows (skipping null).

karyotype_strat_rows.description: Rows with non-null karyotype_at_focal_inv — count tells you whether the karyo_strat view is available.
